calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Continued To Mar-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Scott Hughes, #12365.

Robert Y.P. Chan, Esq. appeared with petitioner Ri Rong Cen, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Alex Cen, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $100,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $24,792.65.
Medical Expenses - $282.76.
Costs - $829.42.

The net balance of $74,095.17 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 1945 Irving Street, San Francisco, CA 94122. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Continued To Jan-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Off Calendar
